title: Speech And Silence.
content:
The words that pass from lip to lip
    For souls still out of reach!
    A friend for that companionship
    That's deeper than all speech!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Bliss Carman (William) delivers a powerful performance in "Speech And Silence."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
